entities.context: V's weekly workout frequency target of 2 days per week

entities.context: 60-day rolling window of resting heart rate data loaded from a database

entities.context: 60-day rolling window of sleep data (score and duration) loaded from a database

entities.name: Rolling 7-Day Summary
entities.context: Rolling 7-day fitness activity summary for trend analysis

entities.name: Fitness Goals Framework
entities.context: Structured goal-setting with weekly minute and day targets, used to benchmark actual activity
